news.summary: Psyence Group Inc. has revealed plans to consolidate its issued and outstanding share capital, with every fifteen old Common Shares combining into one new Common Share. This move, known as the Share Consolidation, will take effect on April 23, 2025, with the Record Date set as April 23, 2025. This announcement was made by the company on April 17, 2025. The company is listed under CSE as PSYG.
news.headline: Psyence Group Inc. will consolidate shares on April 23, 2025, with ratio of 15 old shares to 1 new share.

news.summary: Eli Lilly & Co. saw a rise in stock after reporting Phase 3 results for orforglipron, a GLP-1 receptor agonist for type 2 diabetes. The ACHIEVE-1 trial compared it to placebo in 559 participants. Orforglipron is the first GLP-1 agonist taken without food or water restrictions to complete Phase 3 successfully. There were three dosage groups. Eli Lilly plans to submit orforglipron for weight management regulatory approval by end of 2022 and for type 2 diabetes by 2026. The drug met primary endpoint of superior A1C reduction. Eli Lilly's success is leading to a weight-loss drug craze manifested in India. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Eli Lilly's oral GLP-1 drug Orforglipron successful in Phase 3 diabetes trial with stock surge. 559 participants, 3 doses tested. Submission for weight management this year, diabetes in 2026. A1C reduction shown in trial.

news.summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM) has successfully completed its portfolio optimization initiative, which started a year ago following the Newcrest merger. The company has sold off its Akyem mine in Ghana and the Porcupine operation in Canada as part of this process. The total after-tax cash proceeds generated from these sales amount to around $850 million before closing adjustments, as announced by Tom Palmer, Newmont's President and CEO. Through this initiative, Newmont aims to generate a total of up to $4.3 billion in gross proceeds, with $3.8 billion coming from non-core asset sales and $527 million from other investment disposals. The capital raised from these divestitures has bolstered Newmont's balance sheet and has allowed the company to achieve its financial goals.
news.headline: Newmont finishes year-long portfolio optimization, generating $850M from Akyem and Porcupine sales, aiming for $4.3B in total.

news.summary: In Saskatchewan, Westinghouse Electric Company and the University of Saskatchewan have signed a Memorandum of Agreement (MoA) aimed at speeding up the introduction of the eVinci® microreactor in the region. The collaboration will involve joint efforts to advance the technical aspects and deployment analysis of the eVinci technology. This initiative seeks to facilitate the deployment of Canada's premier eVinci microreactor.
news.headline: Westinghouse partners with University of Saskatchewan to deploy eVinci® microreactor in Saskatchewan, aiming to accelerate its deployment.

news.summary: The recent appointments in leadership positions are instrumental in bolstering the company’s capacity to expand while providing a tailored care approach for women’s health and family planning. These additions in leadership aim to facilitate the company's growth and optimize its services in these key areas.
news.headline: Progyny appoints Melissa Cummings as COO and Geoffrey Clapp as CPO to support scaling and women's health.

news.summary: Infosys, a renowned multinational corporation specializing in digital services and consulting, disclosed its recent acquisition aimed at bolstering energy and commodity trading and risk management (E/CTRM) capabilities. The acquisition, made on April 17, 2025, in Bengaluru, India and Houston, involved a substantial financial transaction. Infosys, listed on NSE, BSE, and NYSE under the symbol INFY, is on the forefront of integrating advanced technologies to provide innovative solutions to their clients worldwide.
news.headline: Infosys to acquire MRE Consulting to enhance E/CTRM capabilities, strengthening energy and commodity trading. (Characters: 105)

news.summary: Arrow Electronics, Inc. (NYSE: ARW) will conduct a conference call on May 1, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. ET to discuss their first-quarter 2025 financial results. Investors can access a live webcast of the call through the events section of investor.arrow.com or via the webcast link at https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/980513710. Following the call, a replay will be posted on the Arrow website for those unable to attend.
news.headline: Arrow Electronics (NYSE:ARW) to host Q1 2025 earnings call on May 1, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. ET. Webcast available.

news.summary: Today in Redmond, Washington, Nintendo announced in a Mario Kart World Direct presentation that the upcoming Mario Kart game, set to be the largest in series history, will be released exclusively for the Nintendo Switch 2 system on June 5. A special bundle containing the Nintendo Switch 2 system and a game download code for Mario Kart World will also be released on the same date. This installment of Mario Kart introduces a series-first feature, marking a significant milestone for fans of the beloved racing franchise.
news.headline: Nintendo announced in a Mario Kart World Direct that the biggest Mario Kart game ever will launch on Nintendo Switch 2 on June 5. A bundle including the system and game download code will also be available.
ECB's President Lagarde: We look at the entire trade balance, not just goods.

news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Caliber has disclosed the pricing of its public offering units.
news.headline: Caliber in Arizona priced public offering units.

news.summary: In the past month, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has experienced sideways trading, sparking discussions about the next significant trend. Recently, on-chain analytics company CryptoQuant examined the selling pressure on Bitcoin in the last two weeks. Contrary to assumptions, large investors (whales) are not responsible for sell-offs; instead, short-term holders have been driving the recent dips. On average, short-term holders have been selling around 930 BTC daily, while long-term holders only about 529 BTC per day. The data from the Exchange Inflow Age/Value Bands highlights that short-term holders are the primary contributors to the current turbulence, while long-term holders show minimal selling activity. Further breakdown based on wallet sizes indicates that retail investors... Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin remains under $85,000, with short-term holders selling 930 BTC per day versus long-term holders selling 529 BTC. Whales aren't dumping as per CryptoQuant analysis.

news.summary: A joint venture has been established to expedite the transformation of business processes for companies using digital procurement platforms in BENGALURU, India and TOKYO. Infosys, a renowned provider of next-generation digital services and consulting with listings on NSE, BSE, and NYSE as INFY, disclosed this initiative on April 17, 2025.
news.headline: Mitsubishi Heavy Industries partners with Infosys-led JV HIPUS in Japan for digital transformation. Infosys (INFY) leading the initiative.

news.summary: Alcoholics Anonymous (A.A.) is gearing up to celebrate its 90th anniversary with a grand International Convention set to take place in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada from July 3 to 6, 2025. The event is expected to draw tens of thousands of members and guests from various parts of the world. This gathering will commemorate nearly a century since the establishment of the Fellowship, signifying a significant milestone for the organization.
news.headline: Alcoholics Anonymous celebrating 90 years at 2025 Vancouver Intl Convention with tens of thousands in attendance.

news.summary: Trisha Leckow, a prominent figure in the field of echo technology, has been recognized by Women in Trucking. The announcement was made on April 17, 2025, in Chicago. Trisha Leckow is associated with Echo Global Logistics, Inc., a top player in technology-driven transportation and supply chain management services. This accolade highlights her expertise and leadership in the industry.
news.headline: Echo Global Logistics VP Trisha Leckow named to 2025 Top Women to Watch list by Women in Trucking. Chicago, April 17, 2025.

news.summary: A report on Dolomite (CAS 16389-88-1) has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, providing insights into the global and regional market trends from 2019 to 2024 and forecasting up to 2029. The report offers comprehensive information on Dolomite, including its general details, synonyms, chemical composition, safety measures, hazards, handling, storage guidelines, toxicological and ecological considerations, as well as transport information. This detailed study acts as a valuable resource for gaining a deeper understanding of the Dolomite industry.
news.headline: Report on Dolomite industry trends 2019-2024 & forecasts to 2029. Provides insights on CAS 16389-88-1, including safety, hazards, storage, and transport information. From ResearchAndMarkets.com.

ECB's President Lagarde: We account for exchange rate in monetary policy decision.

news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Whisker and Tidy Cats in Auburn Hills, Michigan, to introduce a new collaborative project called The Perfect Cycle. This initiative aims to combine the expertise and resources of both companies to provide innovative solutions in the pet care industry. The partnership is set to leverage the unique strengths of Whisker and Tidy Cats, bringing together their capabilities to enhance product offerings and customer experience. This collaboration is expected to drive growth and create value for both companies, with an initial investment totaling in the millions. The Perfect Cycle project is anticipated to revolutionize the pet care market and set new benchmarks for industry standards.
news.headline: Whisker and Tidy Cats join forces in Auburn Hills to launch The Perfect Cycle.

news.summary: Today, in Whitestone, New York, BODYARMOR Sports Drink unveiled a revitalized version of its renowned sports drink brand. This significant moment comes after almost 15 years and showcases a revamped visual identity featuring a new wordmark, eye-catching packaging, and the introduction of the brand's first-ever icon.
news.headline: BODYARMOR Sports Drink reveals refreshed visual identity after nearly 15 years; new wordmark, packaging, and brand icon.

news.summary: Minneapolis - April 17, 2025 - L3 Family Wealth Partners, an esteemed financial planning firm focused on retirement strategies, has unveiled its latest office in the Mill District of Minneapolis. The firm, known for its expertise in serving retirees, aims to expand its reach in the area.
news.headline: L3 Family Wealth Partners opens new office in Minneapolis to address rising demand for retirement planning services.

news.summary: In Clearwater, Florida, on April 17th, 2025, Veterans Help Group (VHG) and the Sixth Region Association of the United States Army (AUSA) have forged a groundbreaking partnership focused on enhancing awareness and streamlining support for earned disability benefits. This initiative marks a significant step towards aiding veterans in accessing the benefits they deserve.
news.headline: VHG and Sixth Region AUSA collaborate to boost disability support for veterans, enhancing understanding and assistance with benefits.

news.summary: In the town of New Windsor, N.Y., on April 17, 2025, Polaris Aviation Solutions, a leading company in private and corporate aviation management, announced its fulfillment of the FAA's Part 5 Safety Management System (SMS) regulations. This accomplishment was attained through dedicated efforts by the team at Polaris Aviation Solutions.
news.headline: Polaris Aviation Solutions complies with FAA Part 5 SMS regulations with help from Aviation Safety Solutions.

news.summary: Explore First Charge's wide range of services by stopping at Booth #6789 during the upcoming Advanced Clean Transportation (ACT) Expo in Cincinnati from April 28-30, 2025. First Student, a leading provider of electric student transportation, will be showcasing their offerings at the event. Don't miss the opportunity to learn more about their comprehensive services and solutions.
news.headline: First Student to showcase First Charge Solution at ACT Expo 2025 (Booth #6789) from April 28-30. Leader in electrified student transportation.

news.summary: In Lausanne, Switzerland, Timeline®, a leading Swiss consumer biotech company focusing on longevity research, has introduced Mitopure® Gummies. These gummies provide a new and easy way to consume the Urolithin A supplement, a potent postbiotic in a patented and pure form. Mitopure Gummies aid in enhancing cellular health by facilitating the elimination of damaged mitochondria and waste through mitophagy, as well as promoting the generation of fresh, healthy mitochondria. This process boosts the cell's energy production capabilities, often resulting in improved overall cell function.
news.headline: Swiss company Timeline launches Mitopure® Gummies for cellular health, aiding in mitochondrial repair and energy production.
ECB's President Lagarde: German stimulus is to lift growth, price impact unclear.

news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has reached a new low of 3.6%, the lowest it has been in the past 50 years. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 3.8%. Additionally, the economy added 263,000 jobs in the month of April, surpassing the expectations of economists. The job growth was primarily fueled by gains in the professional and business services sector, as well as in the healthcare industry. These positive numbers have contributed to a sense of optimism among analysts and policymakers regarding the state of the economy.
news.headline: Míla Holding hf. confirms report on MILA 300929 bond's financial obligations. #MilaHoldings #bondholders #finance

news.summary: In a notable development in the medical field, EBR Systems, Inc. (ASX: EBR) based in SUNNYVALE, California, announced on April 17, 2025, that they have obtained FDA approval for the WiSE® System. This milestone approval signifies a substantial advancement in treatment methods. It is poised to revolutionize the discourse around medical care.
news.headline: FDA approves WiSE® System as world's 1st leadless LVEP device for CRT. EBR Systems, Inc. (ASX: EBR) announces milestone in medical advancement.

news.summary: In the latest financial report for the fiscal first quarter of 2025, American Express Co (NYSE: AXP) experienced a stock price drop following the release. The company disclosed a revenue growth of 7% year-on-year, reaching $16.97 billion, surpassing the estimated $16.94 billion by analysts. The surge in revenue was attributed to robust Card Member spending, increased net interest income fueled by growth in revolving loan balances, and a rise in card fees. GAAP EPS stood at $3.64, outperforming the projected $3.47 by analysts. Notably, Card Member spending, also known as Billed Business, increased by 6% year-on-year to reach $387.4 billion. Furthermore, U.S. Consumer Services revenue saw a 7% growth year-on-year, totaling $8.25 billion. For more detailed information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: American Express reported Q1 2025 results with revenue growing 7% to $16.97 billion, EPS at $3.64, and card member spending up 6% Y/Y. Stock fell post-report.

news.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange Bybit is shutting down several Web3 services, including its Cloud Wallet, Keyless Wallet, NFT marketplace, multi-chain DEX Pro, and Swap & Bridge widget on May 31. Additionally, Bybit will discontinue its loyalty program, Web3 Points, and other services like its inscription marketplace, NFT Pro, gateway to Apex Pro derivatives DEX, fiat-to-crypto on-ramp, and initial DEX offering service on April 28, 2025. The company cited a focus on core products and commitment to quality as reasons for the shutdowns. Bybit's move follows a $1.4 billion hack in February, and reports suggest the exchange is integrating a Bitcoin yield product from Avalon to offer users Bitcoin yield opportunities. Bybit has denied claims of charging $1.4 million to list tokens on its platform. The company had not commented on rumors about recouping hack losses.
news.headline: Bybit closes 4 more Web3 services including NFT marketplace & DEX Pro on May 31. Also discontinuing loyalty program and more.

news.summary: A company with headquarters in Boulder, Colorado and San Jose, California recently released information about advancements in display technology. The Rain Technology experts provided commentary and video explanations for business leaders regarding breakthroughs in displays for mobile devices, laptops, ATMs, point-of-sale systems, and automotive applications. This information was shared through a press release and aimed to inform professionals about the latest developments in display technology for various industries.
news.headline: Rain Technology experts discuss display advancements for various industries like mobile, laptops, ATM, POS, and automotive.
